title: SPANN Roofing & Sheet Metal ransomware incident

extortion.description: Spann Roofing & Sheet Metal is a provider of installation, maintenance and repair services for commercial, industrial, institutional and residential roofing systems in the eastern sections of North and South Carolina. We are going to upload data of this company. Complete data of allthe employees (DOB, SSN, address, phone, email, driver license and so on), agreements, detailed financial data, customer data, etc.
